name: OmopProcedureProcedureOccurrenceView
title: Procedure → procedure_occurrence (flat)
description: One FHIR Procedure maps to one procedure_occurrence row. Domain routing may redirect codes with non-Procedure domain_id to drug_exposure, device_exposure, measurement, or observation. Only completed procedures should produce rows. performed[x] is polymorphic (dateTime or Period) and at least procedure_date is required -- skip the resource if no date is available.

column.name: procedure_occurrence_id
column.description: Surrogate key. Generated via hash/sequence/lookup of Procedure.id. HL7 IG leaves as TODO. NACHC uses FhirToOmopIdGenerator.getId().

column.name: person_id
column.description: Resolve Patient reference to integer person_id. Skip resource if unresolved.

column.name: procedure_concept_id
column.description: Map SNOMED/CPT/ICD-10-PCS/OPS code to OMOP standard concept via vocabulary lookup. Use concept_relationship (Maps to) for non-standard codes. 0 if unmapped. Check domain_id for routing.

column.name: procedure_date
column.description: performedDateTime date part, or performedPeriod.start date part. Required -- skip resource if absent.

column.name: procedure_datetime
column.description: Full ISO datetime. Same source as procedure_date but preserves time component.

column.name: procedure_end_date
column.description: End date for procedures with duration. For performedDateTime, ETL-German leaves null; NACHC sets end = start.

column.name: procedure_end_datetime
column.description: Full ISO datetime of procedure end.

column.name: modifier_concept_id
column.description: SNOMED body site mapped to OMOP concept. Take first bodySite[0] entry; remaining entries are lost. ETL-German also checks OPS site localization extension. 0 if unmapped or absent.

column.name: modifier_source_value
column.description: Raw body site code string. NACHC defaults to 'Not Available' if null.

column.name: provider_id
column.description: First Practitioner-typed performer. Non-Practitioner performers (Organization, Device) are ignored. NACHC defaults to 1 when absent.

column.name: visit_occurrence_id
column.description: Resolve Encounter reference to integer visit_occurrence_id. Null if unresolved (optional field).

column.name: procedure_source_value
column.description: Raw procedure code string. Best code by vocabulary priority (SNOMED > CPT > ICD-10-PCS). Truncate to 50 characters.

column.name: procedure_source_concept_id
column.description: Source vocabulary concept_id (non-standard). Lookup the source code in its native vocabulary. NACHC copies procedure_concept_id here if null. 0 if unmapped.

where.description: status is completed (recommended); code domain_id is Procedure
